channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. How Spain and Italy "Finished Off" NATO Amid Removing U.S. From Alliance Is Now “Beyond Reconsideration”  Defense Express
  2. Trump lashes out at Europe as growing number of allies reject US calls for help  CNN
  3. Spain closes airspace to US planes involved in Iran war, defence minister says  Reuters
  4. More key US allies block military flights as Iran war rift widens with Trump  Fox News
  5. Spain closes airspace to US aircraft involved in Iran war  BBC

item.title: Military plane crashes into cliff killing all 29 aboard - MLive.com
item.description:
1. Military plane crashes into cliff killing all 29 aboard  MLive.com
  2. 29 killed after military plane crashes into cliff  Cleveland.com

item.title: France's Macron Criticizes Trump and Calls on Allies to Unite Against US - Bloomberg.com
item.description:
1. France's Macron Criticizes Trump and Calls on Allies to Unite Against US  Bloomberg.com
  2. Macron Says Nations Should Stand Up To U.S. And China As Trump Feud Grows  Forbes
  3. Macron urges world to unite against US dominance  newsukraine.rbc.ua
  4. Macron touts Europe's 'predictability' during Japan visit in apparent swipe at Trump  France 24
  5. Macron’s Asia visit exposes charge to strengthen global ‘middle powers’  Courthouse News

item.title: Brain scans shed light on how short videos impair memory and alter neural pathways - PsyPost
item.description:
1. Brain scans shed light on how short videos impair memory and alter neural pathways  PsyPost
  2. Stop the brain rot! 12 ways to stay sharp in a mind-frazzling world  The Guardian
  3. I'm a neurologist, and I don't think AI will make people dumber. Here's how to keep your brain sharp.  Business Insider
  4. Your phone could be eating your gray matter and science explains why our brains are shrinking  latination.com
  5. Always online, rarely focused: Is ‘brain rot’ becoming a Saudi problem?  Arab News
